creator: mrkvrg@acm.org
text:
Hello,

I tried to install the port palm/pilot-link but it would immediately produce a fatal error as follows:

--------  clip  ----------------------------------------

Unknown modifier 'T'

"Makefile", line 43: Malformed conditional (! ${PORT_OPTIONS:THREADS})
"Makefile", line 48: if-less endif
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue

---------------------------------------------------------

My port tree is up to date with SVN Revision: 315713.

Any help to resolve this matter will be greatly appreciated.

Cheers ...

How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/palm/pilot-link

# make

I also tried "make fetch", "make checksum", etc. and they all produce the same error message.
